case_title: ZACK KHOURY VS. TEZ MARBLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA. OTTO MARBLE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-13-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZACK KHOURY AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ALI CENGIZ, OPERATIONS MANAGER AT TEZ MARBLE, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS UNWILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA. OTTO MARBLE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZACK KHOURY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA OTTO MARBLE REPRESENTATIVE MEHMET F. ALAYLIOGLU AND WITNESS ALI CENGIZ. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROCESS OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, ZACK AS TO DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA. OTTO MARBLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY KHOURY, ZACK AS TO DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA. OTTO MARBLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHOURY, ZACK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEZ MARBLE, INC. DBA. OTTO MARBLE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
